title: Conflict-Free Ternary Tags (Cap Set in F_3^n)
strategies: swap one {0,1}^4 block for the optimal 20-cap of F_3^4 (product-of-caps)
tile all coordinates into 20-cap blocks (floor(n/4) blocks)
denser algebraic / search-based cap constructions beating the block product
greedy augmentation of a product cap over the remaining points of F_3^n
